feedback: I've been trying to pay for my lunch for two hours and Pix keeps giving a connection timeout error in the app.
Bradesco's Pix crashed again on Friday night! I had to use cash. Ridiculous!
Your chatbot is stuck in an infinite loop sending me to the FAQ. I want to talk to a human!
I signed up for the personal loan at 10 AM and the funds still haven't cleared in my account.
Whenever peak hours hit around 6 PM, Pix simply stops working.
The BIA artificial intelligence does not understand simple commands, it just repeats canned responses in an annoying way.
The release of the payroll loan money is taking much longer than the promised 2-hour timeframe.
Annoying Pix instability this afternoon, the receipt screen froze and I had to restart my phone.
I missed my bill payment deadline because the Copy and Paste Pix gave an unexpected error in the bank's system.
I wanted to clear up a question about fees but the chat's automated customer service disconnected me three times.
I signed the loan contract last night and the balance is still showing as processing.
Pix is down right when I need to pay for gas. Total embarrassment at the gas station.
The digital chat support is useless, the robot doesn't solve anything and doesn't transfer to a human agent either.
The interest rate on the Prime loan is good, but the credit release process into the account took almost an entire day.
I logged into the app this morning to pay a bill, and out of nowhere, someone else's statement and CPF that I don't even know appeared on my screen! My account is 44321-9. What kind of mess is this?
Horrible.
I sent an urgent Pix to the email joao@email.com and the money vanished from my balance but never reached him.
Terrible digital customer service. The BIA robot doesn't solve anything useful and the chat closes by itself.
False advertising on fast credit. I contracted it on the app and the money vanished into a transaction limbo.
Unstable Pix system. My CPF key 987.654.321-00 gives a validation error every time I try to receive a transfer.
The chatbot is extremely limited. Any question outside of its script makes it restart the menu.
I'm waiting for the loan release and your system's slowness is delaying my purchase.
Bradesco Pix is down again. The payment system crashing has become a weekly routine.
To speak with a real agent in the chat you need a lot of patience, because your robot insists on blocking it.
Absurd delay to release credit in my checking account, I had to pay interest on other bills due to the delay.
Pix transactions are taking more than 5 minutes to complete on the Prime app today.
It keeps loading indefinitely and then times out.
The BIA chat artificial intelligence answers things completely unrelated to my question.
They should speed up the release of payroll loan funds contracted electronically.
I went to pay at the grocery store and was embarrassed because the bank app wouldn't complete the Pix transaction.
The virtual assistant enters a repetitive loop, making it impossible to get support to solve serious issues.
The release of the loan money has been processing in the bank's system for over 24 hours.
The Pix payment service in the app is inaccessible tonight. Fix this!
BIA in the digital chat is useless and doesn't know how to route the conversation to the Exclusive team.
Unacceptable delay to clear the personal loan amount contracted via the app.
Pix unavailable. Generic error on the app password confirmation screen.
The bank's customer service robot causes a lot of frustration, it doesn't understand natural language at all.
I am dependent on the release of the loan money to buy medication and the system is extremely slow.
Systemic instability in Bradesco Prime's Pix affecting my business transactions today.
Pix in the app is not working at all today, it keeps showing a momentary unavailability error.
Digital customer service is too rigid, the chat's artificial intelligence is very poorly trained.
Lack of speed in releasing resources for pre-approved loans on the mobile channel.
App crashing when scanning Pix QR Code for commercial purchases. System is highly unstable.
I want to speak with a human manager in the chat, but the AI system blocks the transfer and keeps repeating options.
Absurd wait time for personal credit clearance contracted in the digital environment.
Pix is down once again. Impossible to trust Bradesco for daily payments.
Terrible automated support, the BIA robot doesn't know how to answer basic account questions.
Securing the loan was easy, but the balance is taking hours to drop.
It didn't work.
Your chat should have an option to speak directly with humans without passing through the robot's dumb funnel.
Systemic slowness to update the balance after signing up for debt renegotiation on the app.
Pix processing is slow today in the Prime segment, causing delays in my transfers.
General instability in the bank's Pix system this afternoon. App is out of service.
Your automated customer service is a barrier to solving problems and irritates the client.
I signed the loan contract 5 hours ago and still nothing has hit my checking account.
Friday night and Pix simply does not work on your app. Highly disrespectful.
The chat AI enters an infinite loop that prevents any kind of support.
Excessive delay to process and release personal finance balance in my account.
I can't make any Pix transfers today. It keeps showing an authentication error with the bank's server.
The BIA digital chat is inefficient and bureaucratic, solving nothing of real utility.
The bank's system is very slow today to credit loans that have already been approved.
Pix with recurring instability. Bradesco urgently needs to invest in server infrastructure.
Frustrating automated service. The chatbot does not understand common terms and disconnects.
I need the loan balance to cover my account and the slowness in releasing it is hurting me.
Unfeasible to use Bradesco Pix today for business due to the massive loading lag.
Always with errors validating Pix. App is very unstable on payday.
The BIA artificial intelligence is dumb, it can't solve anything beyond simple balance inquiries.
Absurd slowness in direct account credit clearance. System is down.
Yet another general instability in Pix on Bradesco app. Terrible service.
This AI chat is pure waste of time. It only serves to stall the customer and solves nothing.
I renegotiated my debt but the balance wasn't released and the system keeps charging interest.
I don't trust Bradesco's Pix. It's constantly offline during crucial hours.
Inefficient chatbot. It cannot interpret what I write and keeps repeating the same menu.
Excessive slowness in releasing payroll loan balance through the app.
Slow app and Pix transfer services are unavailable today.
Constant timeout error when trying to send a Pix. Bradesco is down again.
Automated customer service in the digital chat is terrible, impossible to solve real problems there.
Frustrating wait for the release of contracted funds via digital personal credit.
Pix unavailable on Bradesco app tonight. I had to postpone commercial appointments.
The service robot is extremely annoying and does not help with customer support.
Absurd slowness for processing electronically contracted loans.

I went to use the support chat to clear up a question and, when the history loaded, a strange line of code appeared saying 'senha: admin123456'. I think your system is broken. My Prime account is 99887-2.
The app's Pix system is unstable and showing communication errors with the Central Bank.
Unable to speak with human agents. The bank's digital chat robot blocks the conversation.
I signed up for the loan to pay an urgent bill and the bank's slowness cost me extra interest.
Pix went down when trying to pay at the restaurant. Bradesco always has bugs in the app.
The digital chat customer service AI is useless for solving cloned card issues.
The digital loan release system is experiencing chronic slowness today.
Very unstable app. I can't process Pix payments today.
Frustrated with the robotic answers of the automated chat. There is absolutely no intelligence in this AI.
Slowness to update pre-approved credit data and release the balance in my checking account.
Pix service displaying severe fluctuations late this afternoon on Bradesco Prime.
Impossible to transfer money today. The app gives an error when processing my Pix transaction.
The BIA artificial intelligence is terrible. It left me in an infinite loop and the chat eventually disconnected.
The delay in releasing payroll loan money contracted through the mobile phone is ridiculous.
I can't generate the temporary virtual card in the app. It gives a momentary unavailability error.
Physical branch was crowded at lunchtime. It took almost an hour to cash the check.
Bureaucratic support and slow response times to solve incorrect fee charges.
I really like the Prime card limit, but the bank's integrated investment app is extremely confusing.
Abusive interest rates charged after systemic instability prevented on-time payment on the due date.
